series_metadata.series_description: A paper file is maintained for each program member (active, inactive and annuitants); types of data retained include enrollment forms and disclosure statements, program amendment forms, playroll authorization forms, life insurance applications, exchange authoriztion forms, suitability questionnaire, correspondence, emergency withdrawl request forms, benefit payment forms, deminimus withdrawl forms, legal notices.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office one year full withdrawl of participant's funds - change file designation inactive and comply with retention schedule inactive participant files
